item.title: A beginner’s guide to Front End Web Development
item.dc:creator: admin
item.description:
A beginner’s guide to Front End Web Development: HTML CSS JavaScript Web Applications Applications that are accessed using Web-based protocols (HTTP/S) are known as Web Applications. They have 2 major components: UI (Front End) API (Back End) Front End (UI) Front End is the User Interface (UI) and, it’s the visual part of a Web Application. Front End is mostly accessed from Web Browsers. Web Browsers contain 2 engines: Browser Engine JavaScript Engine JavaScript Engine A Browser Engine renders the web page, but it can’t handle all events that may occur. A JavaScript Engine is for this purpose. Browser Engine…

The post A beginner’s guide to Front End Web Development appeared first on Khawar Mehfooz.
item.content:encoded:
A beginner’s guide to Front End Web Development:

  • HTML
  • CSS
  • JavaScript

Web Applications

Applications that are accessed using Web-based protocols (HTTP/S) are known as Web Applications.

They have 2 major components:

  • UI (Front End)
  • API (Back End)

Front End (UI)

Front End is the User Interface (UI) and, it’s the visual part of a Web Application.

Front End is mostly accessed from Web Browsers.

Web Browsers contain 2 engines:

  • Browser Engine
  • JavaScript Engine

JavaScript Engine

A Browser Engine renders the web page, but it can’t handle all events that may occur.

A JavaScript Engine is for this purpose.

Browser Engine

Websites are divided into multiple pages. At any time a single page is rendered. This is called a Web Page.

Browser Engines are responsible to parse a web page and, rendering it in browser.

HTML, CSS & JavaScript

There exists these 3 popular languages for Front End Development.

Why so many? They help in the clear separation of concern.

Let’s see how they operate

  • HTML ➟ Structure
  • CSS ➟ Presentation
  • JavaScript ➟ Behaviour

Let’s understand using an analogy

  • HTML is like a raw-built house. It’s just a structure laid out.
  • CSS is like adding all facilities and, beautifying. You paint, you make modular designs.
  • JavaScript is like operating all these. You switch on light, open the tap etc.🏁 Final Words

Web Applications have 2 major parts. UI (Front End) is the visual part of it.

  • UI is built using 3 languages viz. HTML, CSS and JavaScript.
  • HTML is for structuring, CSS is for presentation and JavaScript adds behaviour.

The post A beginner’s guide to Front End Web Development appeared first on Khawar Mehfooz.

item.title: Useful VS Code Extensions to Boost Your Productivity 2022
item.dc:creator: admin
item.description:
Here are the some Useful VS Code Extensions to Boost Your Productivity. Prettier Prettier is a code formatter which helps to keep code style consistent. Better Comments The Better Comments extension will help you create more human-friendly comments in your code. GitHub Co-pilot GitHub Co-pilot is an AI pair programmer that offers autocomplete-style suggestions as you code. Tailwind CSS IntelliSense Tailwind CSS IntelliSense enhances the Tailwind development experience by providing advanced features such as autocomplete, syntax highlighting, and more. Bracket Pair Colorizer Bracket Pair Colorizer makes it much easier to find matching pairs and understand your code.

The post Useful VS Code Extensions to Boost Your Productivity 2022 appeared first on Khawar Mehfooz.
item.content:encoded:
Here are the some Useful VS Code Extensions to Boost Your Productivity.

Prettier

Prettier is a code formatter which helps to keep code style consistent.

Better Comments

The Better Comments extension will help you create more human-friendly comments in your code.

GitHub Co-pilot

GitHub Co-pilot is an AI pair programmer that offers autocomplete-style suggestions as you code.

Tailwind CSS IntelliSense

Tailwind CSS IntelliSense enhances the Tailwind development experience by providing advanced features such as autocomplete, syntax highlighting, and more.

Bracket Pair Colorizer

Bracket Pair Colorizer makes it much easier to find matching pairs and understand your code.

The post Useful VS Code Extensions to Boost Your Productivity 2022 appeared first on Khawar Mehfooz.

item.title: best ways to run your website for less than $6 in 2022
item.dc:creator: admin
item.description:
Here are a few resources to help you promote your project for less than $6 per year If you intend to create a website, you will first require a good and catchy domain name. You can choose the domain name from Namecheap Dreamhost Bluehost Godaddy You may find several domain extensions, including .com, .biz, and.us, on the aforementioned domain registrar, and they cost less than $6. You are free to select any of them as your domain name. Free static site hosting Netlify Vercel Github Pages Render Firebase Hosting Surge Cloudflare pages Free Database Supabase Mongo Atlas Free Backend Netlify…

The post best ways to run your website for less than $6 in 2022 appeared first on Khawar Mehfooz.
item.content:encoded:
Here are a few resources to help you promote your project for less than $6 per year

If you intend to create a website, you will first require a good and catchy domain name. You can choose the domain name from

  • Namecheap
  • Dreamhost
  • Bluehost
  • Godaddy

You may find several domain extensions, including .com, .biz, and.us, on the aforementioned domain registrar, and they cost less than $6. You are free to select any of them as your domain name.

Free static site hosting

  • Netlify
  • Vercel
  • Github Pages
  • Render
  • Firebase Hosting
  • Surge
  • Cloudflare pages

Free Database

  • Supabase
  • Mongo Atlas

Free Backend

  • Netlify Functions
  • Vercal
  • Google Functions

The post best ways to run your website for less than $6 in 2022 appeared first on Khawar Mehfooz.

item.title: Why learning html css and javascript can unlock a career in tech
item.dc:creator: admin
item.description:
Web development is one of the fastest growing jobs in the tech sector. The rise of web apps and e-commerce has been driven demand for more developers that know the fundamental building block of the web; HTML, CSS and JavaScript. There are tons of different specialties within web development: Design Building front-end layouts Architecting font-ends Back-end engineering Dev-ops A ton more With growing complexity, there is a growing demand for people that can own different parts. JavaScript can do it all and then some Part of learning web development is learning JavaScript. At this point, JavaScript can be used in…

The post Why learning html css and javascript can unlock a career in tech appeared first on Khawar Mehfooz.
item.content:encoded:
Web development is one of the fastest growing jobs in the tech sector. The rise of web apps and e-commerce has been driven demand for more developers that know the fundamental building block of the web; HTML, CSS and JavaScript.

There are tons of different specialties within web development:

  • Design
  • Building front-end layouts
  • Architecting font-ends
  • Back-end engineering
  • Dev-ops
  • A ton more

With growing complexity, there is a growing demand for people that can own different parts.

JavaScript can do it all and then some

Part of learning web development is learning JavaScript.

At this point, JavaScript can be used in any scenario to create any kind of application.

  • Mobile
  • Web
  • Desktop
  • Server

You become a swiss army knife developer.

Web development is a great jumping-off point into other tech fields

Although you can find great roles and jobs in web development, most of the higher-paying jobs involve different technology.

Use the core concepts you learn to jump to other languages like Rust or Solidity

The post Why learning html css and javascript can unlock a career in tech appeared first on Khawar Mehfooz.
